---
title: "Sinthavanh CHANTHAVONG"
subtitle: "Development Economics | Trade Policy | Digital Economy"
author: "Sinthavanh CHANTHAVONG"
description: "Sinthavanh CHANTHAVONG is a Ph.D. candidate in Development Economics at Nagoya University working on trade policy, digital economy governance, causal inference, CGE modeling, and Lao PDR development."
keywords:
  - Sinthavanh CHANTHAVONG
  - development economics
  - trade policy
  - digital economy
  - Lao PDR
  - Nagoya University
  - causal inference
  - CGE modeling
image: assets/profile-photo.jpg
---

::: {.name-card}
::: {.portrait}
![](assets/profile-photo.jpg){fig-alt="Portrait of Sinthavanh CHANTHAVONG"}
:::

::: {.card-body}
# Sinthavanh CHANTHAVONG

**Ph.D. Candidate in Development Economics**  
Graduate School of International Development, Nagoya University

I work on trade policy, digital economy governance, and development challenges in Lao PDR and ASEAN.

::: {.tags}
[Trade Policy]{.tag}
[Digital Economy]{.tag}
[Development Economics]{.tag}
:::

::: {.profile-sections}
::: {.profile-section}
## Key Skills

::: {.skill-tags}
[Trade Policy Analysis]{.skill}
[Development Economics]{.skill}
[Causal Inference]{.skill}
[Firm-Level Analysis]{.skill}
[CGE / GTAP Modeling]{.skill}
[Panel Data Econometrics]{.skill}
[Natural Language Processing]{.skill}
[Legal and Policy Mapping]{.skill}
[R, Stata, Python, GAMS]{.skill}
:::
:::

::: {.profile-section}
## Education

- **Ph.D. in International Development**, Nagoya University, 2023-2026
- **M.A. in Asia Pacific Studies**, Thammasat University, 2016-2018
- **B.A. in International Relations**, National University of Laos, 2012-2016
:::

::: {.profile-section}
## Working Profile

- **Research Assistant**, Nagoya University, 2025-2026  
  Trade, tariff, non-tariff measure, and supply-chain data work.
- **Teaching Assistant**, Nagoya University, 2024-2026  
  R, Stata, empirical workflow, and seminar research support.
- **Trade Officer**, Ministry of Industry and Commerce, Lao PDR, 2018-2022  
  ASEAN/RCEP e-commerce policy, regulatory gap assessment, and paperless-trade readiness work.
:::

::: {.profile-section}
## Open Projects

- [**OpenLaw**](https://github.com/SinthavanhCTV/OpenLaw)  
  Machine-readable bilingual Lao PDR legislation repository for legal research, AI-assisted analysis, and public access to legal information.
:::

::: {.profile-section}
## Publications

**Published article**

- [Quantifying the Impact of Trade Liberalization on Lao Imports: Evidence from Product-Level Data](https://link.springer.com/article/10.1007/s42495-024-00136-0). *International Journal of Economic Policy Studies*, 2024.

**Working papers**

- [Critical Minerals, Critical Choices: Reshaping EU Strategy in Global Electric Vehicle Supply Chains](https://adelaide.edu.au/content/dam/adelaideuniversity/documents/research/research-institutes-centres-concentrations/institute-for-international-trade/jean-monnet-centre-of-excellence-in-trade---environment-/wp26-critical-minerals-critical-choices.pdf), with Christian Otchia.
- [Future Trade Integration, LDC Graduation, and Lao Economic Development: A General Equilibrium Analysis](https://www.gtap.agecon.purdue.edu/uploads/resources/download/13405.pdf).
:::
:::

::: {.card-links}
[Email](mailto:sinthavanh.ctv@gmail.com)
[ORCID](https://orcid.org/0009-0006-6795-0571)
[OpenLaw](https://github.com/SinthavanhCTV/OpenLaw)
:::
:::
:::
